mysite
Table of Contents

Class BitacoraService

Namespace
Service.Logic
Assembly
Service.dll

Application-wide audit log service. All BLL operations that have user-visible side effects call this service to record INFO, WARNING, or ERROR entries.

public class BitacoraService
Inheritance
object
BitacoraService
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

If the underlying LogRepository fails to initialize (e.g., database unavailable), the service falls back to WriteLine() so that logging failures never propagate to callers.

Constructors

BitacoraService()

Initializes the service, resolving the log repository from the service factory. Silently degrades to console fallback if the repository cannot be constructed.

public BitacoraService()

Methods

GetLogs(int, int, DateTime?, DateTime?, string, string)

Retrieves paginated log entries, optionally filtered by date range, level, and message text.

public List<Log> GetLogs(int page, int pageSize, DateTime? from = null, DateTime? to = null, string logLevel = null, string message = null)

Parameters

page int

1-based page number.

pageSize int

Number of entries per page.

from DateTime?

Optional lower bound on the log entry timestamp.

to DateTime?

Optional upper bound on the log entry timestamp.

logLevel string

Optional level filter (e.g., "ERROR").

message string

Optional substring filter applied to the message text.

Returns

List<Log>

A list of matching Log(string, string, Exception) entries; empty list if the repository is unavailable.

Log(string, string, Exception)

Writes a log entry. Swallows any internal errors to avoid disrupting callers.

public void Log(string message, string level = "INFO", Exception ex = null)

Parameters

message string

The message to record.

level string

Severity level: "INFO", "WARNING", or "ERROR". Defaults to "INFO".

ex Exception

Optional exception to attach when level is "ERROR".
